mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee(name, phone, email, title, emp_no, department_id, address, status, user_id, resign_date, hire_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{title}, #{empNo}, #{departmentId}, #{address}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), #{userId}, #{resignDate}, #{hireDate})
mapper.update:
UPDATE employee
name = #{name}, emp_no = #{empNo}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, title = #{title}, department_id = #{departmentId}, address = #{address}, status = #{status},
resign_date = #{resignDate},
resign_date = CURRENT_DATE,
resign_date = NULL,
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE employee SET user_id = #{userId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{employeeId} AND (user_id IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId})
UPDATE employee SET user_id = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE employee SET status = 0, resign_date = IFNULL(resign_date, CURRENT_DATE), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.user_id AS userId, e.name, e.department_id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, e.title, e.hire_date AS hireDate, e.status, e.email, e.address, e.phone, e.birthday, e.resign_date AS resignDate, e.created_at AS createdAt, e.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM employee e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id where e.status = 1 ORDER BY e.id DESC
SELECT * FROM employee WHERE full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fullName}, '%')
SELECT birthday FROM employee WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM employee e WHERE e.status = 1 order by e.id

SELECT e.id, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.user_id AS userId, e.name, e.department_id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, e.title, e.hire_date AS hireDate, e.status, e.email, e.address, e.phone, e.birthday, e.resign_date AS resignDate, e.created_at AS createdAt, e.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM employee e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE e.status = 1 AND e.user_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.employee_id = e.id ) ORDER BY e.id DESC
